title: Create: Beverages
description: A flavourful Create addon that introduces drink production.
body:
## About
**Create: Beverages** is an addon for the Create Mod that adds beverages!
Expand your factory with drink production.

## Dependencies
This mod requires the Create Mod to be installed in order to function. This addon will not work on its own. You must have the correct version of Create (Fabric or Forge) depending on your modloader.

## Languages
en_us (English US)
